nodes.name: PCD @ Berlin
nodes.description: A full-day event celebrating creative coding in Berlin.
nodes.long_description:
Join us in Berlin for a full day celebrating 25 years of Processing — the open-source language and environment that has shaped creative coding, data art, and computational design around the world.

The day kicks off with a keynote reflecting on Processing's roots in the MIT Media Lab and its evolution into p5.js, Processing for Android, and a global community of artists, educators, and engineers. From there, the schedule branches into parallel tracks: hands-on workshops for beginners and a talks programme for practitioners.

Workshops will cover generative typography, real-time audio-visual performance with Minim, and building interactive installations with physical sensors. All skill levels are welcome — bring your laptop and curiosity.

The afternoon closes with an open showcase where attendees demo their own work: sketches, installations, printed pieces, and live-coded performances. A casual networking reception follows in Prachtsaal's courtyard.

Admission is free; registration is required for workshop seats. Light snacks and drinks provided.

nodes.name: PCD @ New York
nodes.description: New York's creative coding community comes together for a day of exploration and experimentation.
nodes.long_description:
Join us in New York for a day of creative coding workshops and live performances celebrating 25 years of Processing. The event will take place at Pioneer Works, a vibrant cultural center in Brooklyn known for fostering interdisciplinary collaboration.

The day will feature hands-on workshops covering topics such as generative art, interactive installations, and creative coding with p5.js. These workshops are designed for all skill levels, from beginners to experienced coders.

In addition to the workshops, there will be live performances throughout the day showcasing the work of artists who have been inspired by Processing. Attendees will have the opportunity to see how Processing has influenced a wide range of creative practices, from visual art to music and performance.

Whether you're a seasoned coder or just curious about creative coding, PCD @ New York offers something for everyone. Join us for a day of learning, inspiration, and community celebration.

nodes.description: Celebrating creative coding in the heart of Latin America.

nodes.name: PCD @ Nairobi
nodes.address: Bishop Magua Centre, Ngong Rd, Nairobi, Kenya
nodes.description: Bringing together artists, coders, and makers across East Africa. Join us for workshops, talks, and networking opportunities to foster collaboration and innovation.

nodes.name: PCD @ Melbourne
nodes.description: Workshops, demos, and community talks at Melbourne's screen culture hub. Join us for a day of creative exploration and networking with fellow artists and coders.

nodes.name: PCD @ Amsterdam
nodes.description: Open labs, lightning talks, and collective sketching in Amsterdam. Join us for a day of experimentation and community building at the Waag Futurelab, where artists and coders come together to explore the creative possibilities of code.

nodes.name: PCD @ Seoul
nodes.description: Art and technology converge at Seoul's annual Processing Community Day. Join us for workshops, talks, and a showcase of creative coding projects from Korea and around the world.
